message:
style: apply rustfmt formatting across 11 files in 6 crates

Normalize line widths, reorder imports, and strip trailing whitespace
across ftui-core, ftui-extras, ftui-layout, ftui-render, ftui-runtime,
and ftui-widgets:

- Break long expressions onto multiple lines (charts start_x, syntax
  scan_number conditions, presenter total_cells, input cursor
  assignments, flake_detector variance chain, tree filter_node_paths
  signature and struct literals)
- Reorder imports to canonical rustfmt order (theme OnceLock/atomic,
  sub-module use blocks)
- Strip trailing whitespace on blank lines (layout, terminal_writer,
  notification_queue)
- Collapse over-split tree.rs conditionals to idiomatic single-line form

No behavioral changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
